applied_optimizations.name: fp8_kscale_fallback
applied_optimizations.description: At all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites, changed q_scale=layer.k_scale and kv_scale=layer.k_scale to use fallback: layer.k_scale if layer.k_scale is not None else self.k_scale. This prevents assertion failure in asm_mla.cu:206 when layer.k_scale is None (default in RadixAttention) and Q tensor is FP8.

notes: Fix was already applied from previous trial - all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites have the fallback pattern
self.k_scale initialized at line 205 as torch.tensor([1.0], dtype=torch.float32)
Call sites fixed: line 1977-1978 (forward_extend target_verify), line 2031-2032 (draft_extend non-graph), line 2062-2063 (draft_extend graph), line 2198-2199 (forward_decode)
Test harness: 4/4 sites verified FIXED, SCORE: 100
